selection_likelihood:
High - near-complete stack alignment on                   
  Python/Spark/AWS/Iceberg with lead-level financial-sector data engineering experience
   directly matching FTSE Russell's core requirements.

skills.Databases:
CosmosDB, MSSQL, NoSQL, SnowSQL, kdb+, SQL Server, **Aurora
  PostgreSQL**
skills.Cloud Platforms:
AWS (S3, EC2, EMR, **EMR Serverless**, Glue, **Lambda**,
  Redshift), Snowflake, Azure (Data Factory, Databricks, Synapse), GCP, Terraform
skills.Data Engineering Tools:
DBT, PySpark, **Apache Spark**, Kafka, Data Vault 2.0,
   CDC, ELT, Looker, Looker API, **Apache Airflow** (DAGs), Fivetran, **Apache
  Iceberg**, MLOps, Model Deployment Pipelines, Model Registry, Experiment Tracking,
  Model Versioning, **Great Expectations**
skills.CI/CD:
Git, **GitHub Actions**, CI/CD Pipelines, Azure Function, Agile/Scrum,
  Automated Testing, **pytest**, L3 Support
skills.Data techniques:
ETL, ELT, **Batch Processing**, **Schema Evolution**,
  **Lakehouse Architecture**, Data Modelling, Physical Modelling, Data Ingestion, Data
  Migration, Streaming, Data Warehousing, Data Analysis, CDC, Reconciliation, Semantic
  Layers, Rules Engines, Observability, Self-Service Analytics, Near-Real-Time
  Inference, Feature Drift Monitoring, Model Rollback

Build A Rocket Boy:
Engineered scalable **Python**-based **ELT** pipelines with **DBT** semantic
  layers integrating 100+ source systems into **Snowflake**, processing 120+ TB of data
   with **schema evolution** and full lineage tracking.

Led end-to-end migration from dbt Core to dbt Fusion, establishing modular
  **ELT** pipelines and **CI/CD** workflows via **GitHub Actions** with
  **pytest**-driven test suites, cutting deployment failures by 40%.

Automated **ELT** workflows via **AWS Lambda** event triggers and **EMR
  Serverless** **Apache Spark** jobs, building **observability** frameworks that
  reduced pipeline failures by 35% across 50+ production data jobs.

Designed **Apache Iceberg** lakehouse architecture for **batch processing** of
   AI model workloads using **MLOps** best practices, implementing model registry,
  experiment tracking, versioning, and automated rollback over **Snowflake**.
Architected scalable **ELT** pipelines in **Python**, **Snowflake**, and
  **AWS** (**S3**, **Glue**) with **Apache Airflow** DAG orchestration and
  **CDC**-based ingestion, supporting 5+ trading desks across gas, power, and risk
  functions.

Built rules-engine-driven **data quality** checks with **pytest**-automated
  validation suites and **observability** dashboards, reducing P&L reporting errors by
  30% and increasing data trust across front-office and risk teams.

Conducted code reviews and pair programming sessions for 3 junior engineers,
  authored technical documentation for all **data pipeline** changes, and resolved
  production hotfixes reducing incident resolution time by 25%.
Sodexo:
Led **CDC**-based data ingestion for AMETA region using **Databricks**,
  **PySpark**, and **Apache Spark**, building **observability** frameworks that cut
  third-party tool costs by 80% across 15+ production feeds.

Designed and delivered a fintech self-service analytics platform as
  engineering lead, collaborating with stakeholders to translate business requirements
  into **data-driven** solutions processing 1M+ daily transactions.

Engineered **Agile/Scrum**-driven **ETL** pipelines in **Azure Data Factory**
  with **CI/CD** automation and **automated testing**, delivering self-service
  analytics with full **observability** controls and L3 support for the data
  warehouse.

Mentored 4 junior engineers and led **Data Vault 2.0** physical modelling with
   rules-engine **data quality** checks and **schema evolution** patterns, reducing
  redundancy by 40% and accelerating SDLC delivery by 25%.
Wherescape USA:
Implemented data migration scripts and Azure Synapse Migration for British
  American Tobacco with **pytest**-driven **automated testing** suites and
  multi-cluster **Snowflake** warehouses on **AWS S3**, achieving 99.9% SLA
  compliance.

Designed **Snowflake** external tables on **AWS S3** for JSON/Parquet data,
  automating deployments via **GitHub Actions** **CI/CD** and integrating IoT
  supply-chain feeds via **ELT** pipelines into core analytics serving 500+ users.

Migrated AMD Malaysia's warehouse from Informatica to Wherescape via
  **Agile/Scrum**, building Oracle-to-**SQL Server** transformations and an incremental
   **ELT** pipeline loading 1B+ records with an 80% efficiency gain.

Engineered **CI/CD** workflows using **Git** and **GitHub Actions** across 10+
   concurrent migration projects, enforcing code review standards and **pytest**-driven
   test suites that reduced production defects by 45%.
